but may also need to complete additional General Education and
state-required courses. Please discuss your progress toward
these requirements with your assigned advisor.
**** ADVISING NOTE 2 **** Candidates are required to pass the CT
Foundations of Reading Test and CT-Early Childhood Test to
complete certification. Please discuss these licensure exams with
